title: Shri Annapurna Mata Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Annapurna Mata Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Annapurna.
description:
Barambar pranam,
Maiya barambar pranam.
Jo nahi dhyave vishram Ambike,
Kahan vishram.
Annapurna Devi naam tihare,
Lete hot sab kaam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Pralay yugantar aur janmantar,
Kalantar tak naam.
Sur suron ki rachna karte hain,
Kahan Krishna kahan Ram॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Mitrahi charan chaturanana,
Charu chakradarshyam.
Chandrachood chandranan chakra,
Shobha lakhahi lalam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Devi antim dev dasha mein,
Daya daya tav naam.
Trahi-trahi sharnagat vatsal,
Sharan roop tav dham॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

Shreem, Hreem, Shraddha, Shreem Aieem Vidya,
Shreem Kleem Kamal Kaam.
Kantibhrantimi kanti shantimayivar,
Detu nishkaam॥
॥ Barambar pranam ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Annapurna Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek blessings for an abundance of food, kitchen prosperity, and overall wealth.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: Friday and the occasion of Annakut are considered highly auspicious days for her worship.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Annapurna?
faq.a3: Kheer, Halwa, and pure vegetarian food are very dear to her.
faq.q4: Can Annapurna Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, performing the Aarti in front of her idol near the kitchen or in the home temple is considered very auspicious.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: क्या अब हम श्री तुलसी माता की आरती
